title: rhododendron rufum
intro: Rhododendron rufum, also known as the pink rhododendron or rosebay rhododendron, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family Ericaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron rufum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Rhododendron rufum include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications.
